tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: After losing her leg to cancer, 12-year-old Rhealynn takes the field again
stories.summary: Twelve-year-old Rhealynn Mills returned to the softball field after losing her right leg to cancer, saying 'It was really, I'm really glad I got to step on it.'

stories.headline: At 40, Cape Verdean goalkeeper Vozinha becomes a World Cup history-maker
stories.summary: Vozinha, 40, debuts for Cape Verde at the World Cup and delivers a masterful shutout against Spain—proving it's never too late to chase your dream.

stories.headline: Inspired by one kind act, Chloe creates 50 sensory boxes for children with special needs
stories.summary: A stranger's generosity sparked Chloe Wheeler to craft 50 free sensory boxes for SEN children across her community—kindness multiplied.

stories.headline: One woman's Blessings Box feeds 25 hungry neighbors every single day
stories.summary: Rhonda makes 25 daily sack lunches from her Blessings Box, nourishing disabled families who can't afford meals—pure, quiet generosity.

stories.headline: Eight-year-old son becomes tireless promoter of his burn-survivor mother's recycling business
stories.summary: Eight-year-old Chunchun proudly pitched his burn-survivor mother's recycling business to university students, who eagerly bought her 5-yuan slippers and handed over bottles.

stories.headline: One year after rat eradication, Palau's reefs and seabirds make a spectacular comeback
stories.summary: One year after invasive rats were removed from Ulong Island in Palau, seabirds returned and coral reefs began rebounding faster than scientists predicted.

stories.headline: Twenty-two-year-old softball star Paige returns to the field months after beating breast cancer
stories.summary: Paige Sinicki, 22, made her triumphant debut for the Portland Cascade just eight months after completing chemotherapy, surgery, and radiation for Stage 2 breast cancer.

stories.headline: Cancer survivor Torstein wears Tour de France yellow at 30—four years after testicular cancer
stories.summary: Norwegian cyclist Torstein Traeen wore the Tour de France yellow jersey at age 30, four years after being diagnosed with testicular cancer during a 2022 doping test.

stories.headline: Local salon offers free pampering to storm victims—a moment of grace amid chaos
stories.summary: Salon owner Kylie Allen opens her doors to offer complimentary hair washes and blow-dries to exhausted storm survivors.

stories.headline: Landscaper spends entire day helping neighbors recover from storm damage, refuses payment
stories.summary: Johnny Harris uses his equipment to help neighbors clean up storm wreckage without asking for a penny—true neighborly love.

stories.headline: Pioneering stem-cell therapy offers real hope for Parkinson's patients
stories.summary: Scientists successfully transplanted stem-cell-derived dopamine cells into eight Parkinson's patients with no serious side effects—a transformative breakthrough.

stories.headline: Volunteers commit to staying until every flooded home is restored
stories.summary: Samaritan's Purse Canada volunteers received 85 work orders in Swan River and vowed to stay until every flooded home is restored, however long it takes.

stories.headline: Rare wild sheep herds nearly double across Pakistan's rugged mountains
stories.summary: Punjab urial populations have nearly doubled across the Salt Range's 300-square-kilometre expanse, with recent footage showing wild herds roaming freely without fear.

stories.headline: After 30 years of silence, a beloved singing insect returns to England
stories.summary: British conservationists collected 20 bracken stems bearing New Forest Cicada eggs from a French military base, bringing hope to restore the singing insect lost to England for 30 years.

stories.headline: Meet the half-pound robot that swims the seas and soars the skies
stories.summary: MIT engineers created a half-pound aerial-aquatic robot inspired by diving puffins, proving it can burst from water into flight to monitor marine ecosystems.
